summary: Changed workflow cross-reference syntax from backtick-wrapped '/workflow'_'s _Section_ format to a colon-hash delimited format '/workflow:#Section Title#'. This new format is used consistently across all workflow files. The change also reorganized canonical ownership in core-workflow-authoring.md, moving responsibilities like 'Evaluate Skills' and 'Document Format' from '/skills' and '/plan' to '/lib' respectively. The diff also shows a parameterization pattern: '/lib:#Create Debt Document#(source=/close)'.
